title: Internship with AI start up: Tactile paving defect detection
exerpt: Solo project using Albumentations, OpenCV and Tensorflow to collect data and train a model.
content: Worked on a joint project with LTA analysing and identifying defects in tactile paving tiles in Singapore. - Organised and edited code using Jupyter Notebooks. - Used albumentations and imgaug python libraries to augment image data, experimented with computer vision and data labeling. - Dealed with CSV files extensively, used python to parse and extract data from labels. - Used Tensorflow to train models for defect detection, experimented with both DenseNet and RCNN. Scripts I've written can be found on my Github at this link.

title: Attendance taking app for schools
exerpt: A simple web app to experiment with Flask WTForms and SQLAlchemy.
content: This project is for my school's Computing CA, where every student must design a web app on the topic of "smart schools". I wanted to make an app that demonstrates Flask-WTF and Flask-SQLAlchemy using a SQLite database, storing both accounts and attendance timings in two distinct tables, to familiarise myself with OOP concepts. Students must log in first with a username and full name, then proceed to Confirm Attendance to book in with their username, class and a validation code displayed on the teachers' end. After confirming their attendance, their details and time of confirmation will be shown on Attendance Logs. Teachers must display a unique validation code on their screens inaccessible to students. Accessing this code would require navigating to /password.html. The code will refresh every day at 00 00. Website can be found here at this link.
